summary: Iteration 120: Tested new Dialogue/Script Polish step (Step 4) and storyboard expandable panels. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified 6-step progress bar, DialogueEditor component with 3 tabs (Dubbed/Narrated/Book), character voice selection, and storyboard expand/collapse functionality.

6-step progress bar correctly shows new Dialogues step between Storyboard and Production
Storyboard expandable panels work with 'Abrir Todas' and 'Fechar Todas' buttons
Character voice selection dropdowns properly populated with character names
AI generation endpoints (dubbed, narrated, book modes) all return 200 status
Dialogue save endpoint properly persists data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 120 complete. New Dialogues step (Step 4) fully functional. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. The 6-step pipeline is: 1.Script -> 2.Characters -> 3.Storyboard -> 4.Dialogues -> 5.Production -> 6.Results. DialogueEditor has 3 tabs (Dubbed, Narrated, Book) with AI generation and voice selection per character. Storyboard panels are collapsed by default with 'Abrir Todas'/'Fechar Todas' buttons for expand/collapse all.
